comment.body:
short vix and short vol trades are two different things.

here the short vol and short vix serves one main purpose: to capitalize on the vol selling, and all of its consequences: dealer hedging flow, risk parity, buyback, short squeeze...
i catch "long vol" dynamics on the delta front, bcs those have instant impacts on the delta, while short vol doesn't necessary...
this si the key , why i'm not net long index.
